eyebrow.zh: 本地运行 · 默认不联网 · 切错能退
eyebrow.en: Runs locally · Offline by default · Undoable

headline.zh:
agent 走偏了？只切掉那几轮
不必从头开始
headline.en:
Agent derailed? Cut just those turns
without starting over

sub.zh: 给 Claude Code 和 Cursor 用户：在磁盘上的会话里圈出跑偏的几轮，一刀切掉，留下好的上下文。切错了一键退回。
sub.en: For Claude Code and Cursor users: mark the turns that went wrong in the on-disk session, cut them, keep the good context. Undo with one command if you miss.

body.zh: 一次工具调用和它的返回是绑定的。excise 知道哪几轮是一对，切调用就连同返回一起带走；切了返回留下孤立的调用，它会先警告你。轮次顺序和编号原样保留。
body.en: A tool call and its reply are bound together. Excise knows which turns are a pair — cut the call and its reply goes with it; cut a reply and leave an orphaned call behind, it warns you first. Order and ids are preserved.

title.en: Cut the wrong turn? One command back

body.zh: 每次写回前先自动留底，改动有记录。excise rollback 一条命令按原样还原；留底过 30 天自动清理，不占地方。
body.en: Every write is auto-saved first, with a record of what changed. excise rollback restores it as-is in one command; saves auto-prune after 30 days.

title.zh: 不知道切哪几轮？它先指给你看
title.en: Don't know which turns? It points first

body.zh: excise 读一遍会话，圈出最该切的几轮——超长回复、来回改同一个文件、你纠正过它、工具报错后又改、长篇大论没动手。Claude Code 和 Cursor 的真实会话它都看得一样清楚，只提名，不替你动刀，不联网也不学你的习惯。
body.en: Excise reads the session once and flags the turns most worth cutting — long replies, repeated edits to the same file, turns you corrected, errors-then-corrections, long rambling without action. It reads real Claude Code and Cursor sessions the same way, only nominates, never auto-cuts, runs offline and learns nothing across sessions.

chips: › 圈出超长/重复/纠错/漂移

title.zh: 想要更聪明的提名？可选挂一个模型
title.en: Want smarter picks? Optionally add a model

body.zh: 默认不联网。想更准，可以挂一个本地或远端模型给候选名单重排，每次外连都会告诉你去了哪台主机；连不上就自动回退到上面的规则。
body.en: Offline by default. For sharper picks, point it at a local or remote model to re-rank the candidates; every remote call tells you which host it hit, and a miss falls back to the rules above.

chips: › 默认不联网，挂模型才联网

headline.zh: /clear 与 /compact 之外的第三选择

sub.zh: 开源、Apache-2.0、本地运行、默认不联网。Claude Code 与 Cursor 的会话都在磁盘上原位编辑。
sub.en: Open source, Apache-2.0, runs locally, offline by default. Edits Claude Code and Cursor sessions in place on disk.

tag.zh: 给跑偏的 coding agent 会话做减法
tag.en: Subtractive editing for derailed coding-agent sessions
